name: Echo Fade
description: Sound bouncing away into distant silence

prompts.label: sound bouncing away into ever more distant silence
prompts.text: sound bouncing away into ever more distant silence, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: echo chain diminishing with each reflection
prompts.text: echo chain diminishing with each reflection, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: reverberation trail disappearing into acoustic infinity
prompts.text: reverberation trail disappearing into acoustic infinity, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: canyon echo repeating with progressive softening
prompts.text: canyon echo repeating with progressive softening, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: sound memory fading through layers of atmospheric distance
prompts.text: sound memory fading through layers of atmospheric distance, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
